overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a third-person character navigating from an industrial building entrance through a grimy corridor into a luxurious high-rise apartment with a panoramic city view. The clip transitions from warm artificial lighting to dark gritty environments and finally to a bright neon-lit interior with hexagonal flooring.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial building entrance with security gate

events.description: character stops walking and turns to face an NPC standing near the gate
second NPC approaches from the left side to join the conversation
character turns away from NPCs and begins running toward the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through industrial gate, stopping to converse with an NPC, then turning to run into the building

notable_agents.action: standing guard near the gate, engages in conversation with ego character
approaching from the left side to join the conversation near the gate

entered.detail: large industrial roll-up gate with metal mesh panels and yellow frame
long blue-white fluorescent tubes illuminating the entrance area
screen displaying video feeds mounted on the concrete wall
concrete floor with diagonal yellow warning stripes at the threshold

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an industrial security gate into a covered entrance area with yellow-striped floors and fluorescent lighting. After stopping to converse with an NPC near the gate, another character approaches from the left as the player character prepares to move deeper into the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: grimy back corridor with graffiti and debris

events.description: entering dark narrow corridor from the lit gate area
character slows to a stop and opens the metal door at the corridor end

agents.ego_description: sprinting through dark graffiti-covered corridor toward the exit door

entered.detail: concrete walls covered in colorful spray paint graffiti and tags
scattered garbage bags and debris littering the corridor edges
solid metal door with handle at the end of the corridor
sparse overhead fluorescent lighting casting dim illumination

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a narrow, dimly lit corridor with graffiti-covered walls and scattered trash. The environment is gritty and industrial, with sparse fluorescent lighting overhead, leading to a metal exit door at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury cyberpunk apartment with panoramic window

events.description: entering bright luxury apartment from dark corridor
dramatic shift from dark corridor to bright natural light and neon interior
character approaches the large window to view the cityscape outside

agents.ego_description: walking through modern apartment, examining the living space and approaching the panoramic window

entered.detail: patterned hexagonal tile flooring in white and gray covering the room
modern curved sofa with teal upholstery and colorful pillows
floating holographic screen showing colorful interface and video
large floor-to-ceiling window revealing bright city outside
white oval coffee table with various items and bottles on surface

segments.scene_description: Entering a starkly contrasting luxury apartment, the character explores a spacious room with hexagonal floor tiles, modern curved furniture, and holographic displays. The space is bathed in natural light from a panoramic window revealing a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sterile industrial entrance through a gritty urban corridor and into a lavish high-rise sanctuary. It begins at a security gate with yellow-striped floors and fluorescent lighting, where the character pauses to interact with NPCs before moving deeper into the facility. As the character accelerates, the environment shifts abruptly into a narrow, dimly lit corridor defined by graffiti-covered walls and scattered trash. The scene then opens wide as the character passes through a metal exit door, leaving the industrial grime behind for a spacious luxury apartment featuring hexagonal floor tiles and holographic displays. Finally, the camera reveals a panoramic window that bathes the modern interior in light, overlooking a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape.
